---
title: "Annual Report Analyses Setup"
author: "EWilliams"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
params:
  Start_date: "2023-10-01"
  End_date: "2024-09-30"
---

<!-- This file applies the best models and outputs report anlayses. Models of best fit need to be updated in the following lines:
  Survey: 153 and 
-->

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
#
Summary_Excel_file_name <- "CERP_2026"
Estuary_code <- c("CR", "SL", "LX")
Start_date <- as.Date(params$Start_date)
End_date <- as.Date(params$End_date)
Flow_sites <- c("SL", "LX", "CR")
sheet_lookup <- c(SL = "SLESum", LX = "LOXSum", CR = "S79")
#
#Packages
if (!require("pacman")) {install.packages("pacman")}
#p_unlock()
pacman::p_load(odbc, DBI, dbplyr,
  tidyverse, dplyr,  stringr, #DF manipulation
  DT, openxlsx, readxl,        #Excel
  lubridate, zoo,         #Dates
  glmmTMB, purrr, emmeans, car, broom, multcomp, #Analyses
  knitr, kableExtra, scales, gt, gtExtras,
  install = TRUE)
#
#
# Distributions to test:
dists <- list(
  nb  = nbinom2,
  poi = poisson,
  norm = gaussian
)
#
#
```

```{css}
p {
font-size: 12pt;
}

caption {
  color: black;
  font-weight: bold;
  font-size: 14;
  text-indent: 5%;
} 

h1 {
font-size: 21pt;
font-weight: bold;
}

h2 {
font-size: 17pt;
font-weight: bold;
}

h3 {
font-size: 13pt;
font-style: italic;
text-decoration: underline;
}

h4 {
  color: black;
  font-weight: bold;
  font-size: 17;
  text-indent: 5%;
}
```

```{r Data gather from raw data file, include = FALSE}
# Survey data set up:
Counts_df <- readWorkbook("../Data/CERP_PBC_Raw_Data.xlsx", sheet = 'SrvyCounts', detectDates = TRUE, check.names = TRUE) %>% mutate(RetDate = as.Date(RetDate, "%m/%d/%Y")) %>% 
  subset(RetDate > (Start_date %m-% months(2)) & RetDate < (End_date %m+% months(1))) %>%
  # Filter to CERP sites
  filter(Site %in% c("SL-N", "SL-C", "SL-S", "LX-N", "LX-S", "CR-E", "CR-W")) %>%
  # Remove TIG samples in Winter/Summer
  filter(!(
      grepl("Winter|Summer", Survey) &
      Site %in% c("CR-E", "CR-W") &
      Station %in% c(1, 4)
    )) %>%
  # Calculate Live/Dead per meter2
  mutate(
    Live = NumLive * 4,
    Dead = NumDead * 4,
    Total = Live+Dead,
    SurvCode_n = case_when(
      Survey == "Winter 2023" ~ 0.5,
      Survey == "Spring 2024" ~ 1,
      Survey == "Summer 2024"   ~ 1.5,
      Survey == "Fall 2024" ~ 2,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_)) %>%
  # Make sure columns are factors
  mutate(across(c(Site, Station), as.factor)) %>%
  mutate(SurvCode = as.factor(SurvCode_n),
         DeadRatio = Dead/Total) %>%
    arrange(Site, Station, SurvCode)
#
#
SH_df <- readWorkbook("../Quarterly/Summary data/CERP_PBC_Summary_Data.xlsx", sheet = 'SH Station', detectDates = TRUE, check.names = TRUE)  %>% dplyr::select(Survey, AnalysisDate, starts_with(Estuary_code)) %>% 
  #Remove CR 1,4 Summer Winter
  mutate(AnalysisDate = as.yearmon(AnalysisDate)) %>% 
  subset(AnalysisDate > as.yearmon(Start_date %m-% months(2)) & AnalysisDate < as.yearmon(End_date %m+% months(1))) %>% 
  #replace(is.na(.), -999) %>%
   mutate(across(-Survey,
      ~ if_else(
        str_detect(Survey, "Spring|Fall"),
        .x,
        replace_na(.x, -999)))
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    across(
      c(CR.E1_SHMean, CR.E1_SHSD, CR.W4_SHMean, CR.W4_SHSD),
      ~ if_else(
        str_detect(Survey, "Summer|Winter"),
        NA,
        .x
      )
    )
  )

Cage_df <- readWorkbook("../Quarterly/Summary data/CERP_PBC_Summary_Data.xlsx", sheet = 'SH Mort Cage', detectDates = TRUE, check.names = TRUE)  %>% dplyr::select(AnalysisDate, starts_with(Estuary_code)) %>%
  mutate(AnalysisDate = as.yearmon(AnalysisDate)) %>% 
  subset(AnalysisDate > as.yearmon(Start_date %m-% months(2)) & AnalysisDate < as.yearmon(End_date %m+% months(1)))
#
#
#
```

```{r Survey analyses}
#
## Testing for differences between sites and months
#
# Limit to spring and fall
Counts2 <- Counts_df %>% 
  filter(SurvCode == 1 | SurvCode == 2) %>% droplevels() %>%
  arrange(Site, Station, SurvCode)
#
### Live counts:
# Fit best model:
Live_model <- MASS::glm.nb(Live ~ Site * SurvCode, data = Counts2)
#
#
Live_anova <- Anova(Live_model, type = 3, test.statistic = "F") %>% #best_model$model
  as.data.frame() %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column("Effect") %>%
  rename(
    `Num DF` = Df
  ) %>%
  filter(Effect != "Residuals") %>%
  mutate(`Den Df` = df.residual(Live_model)) %>%
  dplyr::select(Effect, `Num DF`, `Den Df`, `F values`, `Pr(>F)`)
#
Live_anova
#
# LSMeans
Live_site_table <- left_join(
  summary(emmeans(Live_model, ~ Site), infer = TRUE) %>% 
    as.data.frame() %>% 
    dplyr::select(Site, emmean, SE, z.ratio, p.value) %>%
    rename("Estimate" = emmean, "t Value" = z.ratio, "Pr > [t]" = p.value),
  summary(emmeans(Live_model, ~ Site, type = "response")) %>% 
    as.data.frame() %>% 
    dplyr::select(Site, response, SE) %>%
    rename("Mean" = response, "SE Mean" = SE))
#
Live_site_table
#
Live_surv_table <- left_join(
  summary(emmeans(Live_model, ~ SurvCode), infer = TRUE) %>% 
    as.data.frame() %>% 
    dplyr::select(SurvCode, emmean, SE, z.ratio, p.value) %>%
    rename("Estimate" = emmean, "t Value" = z.ratio, "Pr > [t]" = p.value),
  summary(emmeans(Live_model, ~ SurvCode, type = "response")) %>% 
    as.data.frame() %>% 
    dplyr::select(SurvCode, response, SE) %>%
    rename("Mean" = response, "SE Mean" = SE))
# 
Live_surv_table
#
Live_int_table <- left_join(
  summary(emmeans(Live_model, ~ Site * SurvCode), infer = TRUE) %>% 
    as.data.frame() %>% 
    dplyr::select(Site, SurvCode, emmean, SE, z.ratio, p.value) %>%
    rename("Estimate" = emmean, "t Value" = z.ratio, "Pr > [t]" = p.value),
  summary(emmeans(Live_model, ~ Site * SurvCode, type = "response")) %>% 
    as.data.frame() %>% 
    dplyr::select(Site, SurvCode, response, SE) %>%
    rename("Mean" = response, "SE Mean" = SE))
#
Live_int_table
#
# Letters
Live_cld_site <- multcomp::cld(
  emmeans(Live_model, ~ Site),
  Letters = letters,
  adjust = "sidak"
)
Live_cld_site_table <- as.data.frame(Live_cld_site) %>%
  dplyr::select(Site, emmean, .group) %>%
  arrange(desc(emmean)) %>%
  rename(
    Estimate = emmean,
    Group = .group
  )
#
Live_cld_site_table
#
Live_cld_int <- multcomp::cld(
  emmeans(Live_model, ~ Site * SurvCode),
  Letters = letters,
  adjust = "sidak"
)
Live_cld_int_table <- as.data.frame(Live_cld_int) %>%
  dplyr::select(Site, SurvCode, emmean, .group) %>%
  arrange(desc(emmean)) %>%
  rename(
    Estimate = emmean,
    Group = .group
  )
#
Live_cld_int_table
#
#
#
```

```{r Excel output, inlcude = FALSE}
#
file_path <- paste0("../CERP/", Summary_Excel_file_name, ".xlsx")

# If file exists, load it; otherwise create a new workbook
if (file.exists(file_path)) {
  wb <- loadWorkbook(file_path)
} else {
  wb <- createWorkbook()
}
#
## Survey Live counts
sheet_name <- "Live"
# Check if the sheet already exists
if (!(sheet_name %in% names(wb))) {
    addWorksheet(wb, sheet_name)
} 
#
writeData(wb, sheet = sheet_name, x = Live_anova, startCol = 1, startRow = 4)
writeData(wb, sheet = sheet_name, x = Live_site_table, startCol = 1, startRow = 10)
writeData(wb, sheet = sheet_name, x = Live_surv_table, startCol = 1, startRow = 22)
writeData(wb, sheet = sheet_name, x = Live_int_table, startCol = 1, startRow = 27)
writeData(wb, sheet = sheet_name, x = Live_cld_site_table, startCol = 1, startRow = 44)
writeData(wb, sheet = sheet_name, x = Live_cld_int_table, startCol = 1, startRow = 53)
#
# Save workbook (overwrite = TRUE ensures updates)
saveWorkbook(wb, file_path, overwrite = TRUE)
#
```
